name: disconnect_debug_port
short_description: Disconnect nets and pins from debug port channels
full_help:
disconnect_debug_port

Description: 
Disconnect nets and pins from debug port channels

Syntax: 
disconnect_debug_port  [-channel_index <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <port>

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-channel_index]  Disconnect the net at channel index
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution
  <port>            Debug port name

Categories: 
Debug

arguments.description: Disconnect the net at channel index
Suspend message limits during command execution
